author: parithosh
content:
Summary:
Running bad block generator:lodestar-geth-1,nimbus-geth-1,teku-geth-1
EthJS: Unrelated issues, likely perf related to keeping up with head
Besu: Issue triggered by tx-fuzz/bad block generator

author: parithosh
content: if you notice anything else broken, then its an unknown issue 😄

rest ethereumjs nodes are behind head because of the known issue of execution perf
